title: genista elata
intro: Genista elata, also known as the alpine broom or Italian broom, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This shrub-like plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Genista elata include its ability to reduce symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Genista elata often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
